mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.at_leave_balance (employee_no, year, total_days, used_days, carry_over, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{year}, #{totalDays}, COALESCE(#{usedDays}, 0), COALESCE(#{carryOver}, 0), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.request_id, r.doc_id, r.employee_no, r.leave_type, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.days, r.reason, r.status, r.created_at, d.doc_title, d.status AS doc_status FROM platform_v3.at_leave_request r LEFT JOIN platform_v3.ap_document d ON d.doc_id = r.doc_id WHERE r.employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM r.from_date) = #{year} ORDER BY r.from_date DESC
SELECT request_id, doc_id, employee_no, leave_type, from_date, to_date, days, reason, status, created_at FROM platform_v3.at_leave_request WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY request_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.at_leave_request (doc_id, employee_no, leave_type, from_date, to_date, days, reason, status, created_at) VALUES (#{docId}, #{employeeNo}, #{leaveType}, CAST(#{fromDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE), #{days}, #{reason}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'PENDING'), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.request_id, r.employee_no, r.leave_type, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.days, r.status, e.employee_name, e.dept_id FROM platform_v3.at_leave_request r INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_employee e ON e.employee_no = r.employee_no WHERE r.status = 'APPROVED' AND e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND r.from_date <= CAST(#{to} AS DATE) AND r.to_date >= CAST(#{from} AS DATE) ORDER BY r.from_date
SELECT TO_CHAR(holiday_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM platform_v3.cm_holiday WHERE holiday_date BETWEEN CAST(#{from} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{to} AS DATE) ORDER BY holiday_date
